bio:
Howdy, I'm Clara! I've spent nearly 18 years caring for animals of all kinds and am immensely passionate about animal welfare and behavior. It began at a young age with my horse obsession and quickly turned into owning chickens, dogs, cats, hermit crabs, fish...you name it! I have an innate curiosity and appreciation for all creatures great and small and want to share my compassion for animals with your furry (or scaly, or feathered) family members. 

My experience as an equestrian, dog and cat owner, and having worked as a kennel attendant in a humane society and a training and boarding facility has given me hands on experience with various breeds, behaviors, and temperaments. I am very comfortable anxious rescue pups, senior cats on twice-daily medication, energetic puppies who need long walks, and shy kitties who just want quiet company. It is my goal to make your pet feel calm and cared for while you are away and help them feel secure under my supervision. It is important to me to use only positive reinforcement techniques with your pets.

I am motivated to make your experience being away from your pets stress-free and reassuring. I understand that animals are part of our family and deserve to be taken care of as such. When you let me into your home and your pet's routine, I take that seriously and acknowledge the level of trust required. I send daily photo updates, follow your instructions, and always leave your home clean and organized. It would be an honor to care for your pets!
